content: These criteria never improved across 3 iterations and scored <70% — may be unmeasurable or need clearer measurements: replication_lag_monitoring, schema_ddl_handling, data_consistency_validation, automated_rollback_capability, lock_management, dependency_analysis, cutover_coordination, performance_regression_testing, sequence_migration_handling, expand_contract_pattern
task: Write a bash script that performs zero-downtime PostgreSQL migration from version 14 to 16 with logical replication, automated rollback, and health checks.
